title: Bulbophyllum mutabile
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum mutabile is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Bulbophyllum. This genus is part of the subtribe Bulbophyllinae, which is a group of orchids characterized by their unique flower shapes and colors. The species is further classified as a member of the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Within the Orchidaceae family, Bulbophyllum mutabile is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes over 20,000 known species of orchids. As a species of orchid, Bulbophyllum mutabile is also classified as a flowering plant within the kingdom Plantae.

However, the medicinal uses of Bulbophyllum mutabile are not well-documented or extensively researched. In some cultures, it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
